name: frontend-design
description: Builds production-grade frontend interfaces with intentional, distinctive aesthetics instead of generic AI output.
trigger: Activate this skill when the user asks to create, build, or design a frontend interface, landing page, dashboard, component, or UI element and quality of visual output matters. Do not activate for purely functional tasks like fixing a bug in existing CSS, adjusting a layout value, or writing utility functions. If the user explicitly asks for a plain or unstyled component, do not apply this skill.
author: lediegz
